title: Sistema NEST IT Meal Prep Containers | 1.9 L | Airtight Food Storage Containers with Compartments & Lids | School Lunch Boxes | Green | 5 Count
features: PREP, EAT, REPEAT: Meal prep containers that feature three compartments to keep food separate until you're ready to eat
GREAT FOR BATCH COOKING: Lid with easy-locking clips and extended flexible seal helps keep food fresher for longer
NESTABLE DESIGN: Allows you to save on space when containers are not in use
DIMENSIONS: L 240 mm x H 142 mm x W 224 mm
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Dishwasher (top rack), microwave (without lid), fridge and freezer-safe; designed and made in New Zealand
description: From the manufacturer Meal Prep Perfection Sistema Nest It containers make it easy to prep and pack meals ahead of time. Airtight, easy-locking lids keep foods fresh while you're on the go. The durable 870 ml food storage containers have two compartments, perfect for separating different items, and they come in a set of ten so you can get ready for the full work or school week. Cleanup and storage is just as easy. They're safe to use in the freezer, microwave, and dishwasher, plus they stack neatly to save space. Key Features Airtight, easy-locking lids are leak resistant Durable and reusable 2-part divided containers hold multiple foods Nested design makes storage simple BPA- and phthalate-free For Stress-Free Lunch Planning Dependable and Reliable Airtight, easy-locking clips keep food fresh; durable containers can be used over and over again. Customise Your Lunch! 3-part divided containers let you fit a variety of foods and keep them separate. Prep Ahead Get ready for a busy week with the convenient 5-piece set. Meal Prep Made Easy Use and Store Anywhere Made with microwave- and freezer-safe materials that are also BPA- and phlalate-free. Effortless Cleanup Durable dishwasher-friendly lids and containers make washing a breeze. Stay Organised Designed to nest perfectly together when not in use to save space in drawers and cabinets.
